message:
Fix: Allow reviewing escalated requests

The CanApprove() function and review service were only allowing
StatusPending requests to be reviewed. With escalated state transitions
in place, escalated requests also need to be reviewable by humans.

- Update CanApprove() to include StatusEscalated
- Update SubmitReview() and CanReview() to use CanApprove()
- Add test case for StatusEscalated in TestCanApprove

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
